title: Bromus latior
taxonomy: Bromus latior is a species of grass within the family Poaceae. It belongs to the subfamily Pooideae, a large and diverse group of cool-season grasses. The genus Bromus is a genus of true grasses, commonly known as brome grasses. The species Bromus latior is classified as a perennial grass, typically found in temperate regions with moist to dry soil conditions. The classification of Bromus latior reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants within the family Poaceae.
